name: Charlie Gabriel
abstract: Charlie Gabriel (born July 11, 1932) is an African American jazz musician who plays the saxophone, trumpet, clarinet, and flute.

interviews.title: Charlie Gabriel interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

concerts.label: Preservation Hall Jazz Band and Friends
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Wendell Brunious
about_quotes.evidence: I had Charlie Gabriel, who is from New Orleans but he lives in Detroit now, he left New Orleans with the Fats Navarro kids band, like way back in ’47 or something like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendell Brunious interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
